## Summary

Describe the change in 1-3 short points.

## Why

Explain the problem this PR solves or the reason for the change.

## Scope

- [ ] Desktop app
- [ ] Core gateway
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] CI / release

## Validation

List the checks you ran locally, or explain why none were run.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is limited to one clear topic
- [ ] I updated documentation if behavior or setup changed
- [ ] I verified the affected area locally when possible
- [ ] CI should pass for this PR

## Notes

Add any reviewer context, tradeoffs, or follow-up work here.
